title: fibigia clypeata var. obovata
intro: Fibigia clypeata var. obovata, also known as the Korean rock jasmine, is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. It is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
